title: Data Integration Documentation

overview.problem: Disconnected data sources between customer JSON files, MongoDB, and customer portals
overview.solution: Unified data mapping and real-time portal updates
overview.dataFlow: Customer JSON → Portal Updates → Admin App Integration

integrationPoints.agents: n8n workflows are the actual agents
integrationPoints.customerData: JSON files contain customer profiles and agent configurations
integrationPoints.portalData: React components display real customer data
integrationPoints.adminData: MongoDB models exist but need population from JSON sources

nextSteps: Populate MongoDB with customer data from JSON files
Create API endpoints to sync data between sources
